content.text:
<user_query>
Perform security review of toolbox change to /Users/HanHu/.cursor/commands/deploy-fuyao.md for host `Huh8.remote_kernel.fuyao` and report overall (`pass|warn|block`), finding count, and blockers.
</user_query>

agent: SecurityReviewer
host: Huh8.remote_kernel.fuyao
overall: warn
finding_count: 3
sync_decision: prompt
blockers:
  - file: /Users/HanHu/.cursor/commands/deploy-fuyao.md
    issue: Untrusted or custom user-supplied values (`branch`, `task`, `label`, etc.) are specified as interpolated arguments in the SSH command pattern; if the caller does not apply strict quoting/validation, this enables remote command injection on the kernel host.
warnings:
  - file: /Users/HanHu/.cursor/commands/deploy-fuyao.md
    issue: Remote workflow includes `git reset --hard origin/<branch>` which is destructive and can discard remote uncommitted or divergent work without explicit backup/confirm gate.
  - file: /Users/HanHu/.cursor/commands/deploy-fuyao.md
    issue: Fallback SSH destination is hardcoded (`remote.kernel.fuyo`), increasing risk of deployment drift and violating destination-governance practices.
recommended_fixes:
  - Enforce strict validation/whitelist for all interpolated values and pass them as safely quoted arguments rather than raw string concatenation in SSH command construction.
  - Add an explicit, hard-stop confirmation before destructive reset and optionally show remote/local hash diff before execution.
  - Remove hardcoded fallback destinations; resolve allowed remotes from policy/SSH config and require explicit user approval when resolution changes from the preferred alias.
